extracted_information: Buddy is a cannabis app offering personalized information, AI-powered tools, and social engagement features.

features.name: AI-powered product identification
features.description: Users can take a picture of any cannabis product to instantly receive comprehensive information about it.
features.technical_details: Utilizes image recognition and a 'knowledge machine' for data retrieval.

features.name: AI-powered knowledge machine
features.description: Provides meaningful and trusted information about cannabis.
features.technical_details: Acts as a centralized source for cannabis knowledge.

features.name: Personalized cannabis information
features.description: Tailors cannabis information to individual users, helping them understand effects and public opinions.

features.name: Social networking & experience sharing
features.description: Enables users to connect with friends and share their cannabis experiences.

features.name: User-generated product reviews
features.description: Allows users to post reviews of their favorite products and view reviews from others.

temporal_info.launch_context: Built by a small group of friends starting May 2022.
